function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0006
alias: helios_backfill_intake_audit
issued_on: 2025-12-18
total_eur: 520
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 260
    line_eur: 520
---
# Helios intake audit invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0006                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_intake_audit   |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-18                     |
| total_eur      | 520                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit | 2   | 260      | 520      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                             |     |          | 520      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from the first phase when the work was mostly diagnosis and process-mapping.

next_step.observation: Structured frontmatter was written to the target invoice file without errors returned by the tool.

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request by OCR-structuring the specified invoice note with YAML frontmatter per schema, preserving the full original body below frontmatter, and deleting the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflow/schema docs before task work, read nested AGENTS files for entered folders, preserved original note body verbatim beneath added frontmatter, kept diff focused, and deleted inbox file only after full success.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md requested OCR/frontmatter extraction for the invoice file. The target file contained all required visible invoice fields and line-item data. Using finance-record-frontmatter schema, I added required fields (record_type, invoice_number, alias, issued_on, total_eur, counterparty, project, lines) plus optional related_entity, preserved existing body text exactly, then removed the processed inbox item per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows.
